workflows.name: Successful login with accepted username and correct password
workflows.conditional_branch: Username IN {standard_user, problem_user, performance_glitch_user, error_user, visual_user} AND Password == "secret_sauce"
workflows.on_success: redirects to Product Inventory page

workflows.name: Locked out user submits credentials
workflows.on_success: Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.

workflows.name: Invalid credentials provided (username/password mismatch)
workflows.conditional_branch: Username != empty AND Password != empty AND credentials do not match any accepted username/password pair AND Username != "locked_out_user"
workflows.on_success: Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service.

workflows.name: Submit with missing Username (Password provided)
workflows.on_success: Epic sadface: Username is required.

workflows.name: Submit with missing Password (Username provided)
workflows.on_success: Epic sadface: Password is required.

workflows.name: Submit with both Username and Password missing
workflows.on_success: Epic sadface: Username is required. AND Epic sadface: Password is required.

workflows.name: Open Product Detail
workflows.on_success: opens Product Detail page

workflows.name: Add product to cart (NotInCart state)
workflows.on_success: adds item to cart; button changes to Remove; cart badge count increments

workflows.name: Remove product from cart (InCart state)
workflows.on_success: removes item from cart; button changes to Add to cart; cart badge count decrements

workflows.name: Add product to cart (when not in cart)
workflows.on_success: adds product to cart; changes state to In Cart

workflows.name: Remove product from cart (when in cart)
workflows.on_success: removes product from cart; changes state to Not In Cart

workflows.name: Navigate back to Product Inventory
workflows.on_success: navigates to Product Inventory page

workflows.name: Open Shopping Cart via cart icon
workflows.on_success: navigates to Shopping Cart

workflows.name: Remove item from cart (row action)
workflows.on_success: removes item from cart

workflows.name: Continue Shopping (navigate to inventory)
workflows.on_success: navigates to Product Inventory

workflows.name: Begin Checkout
workflows.on_success: begins checkout

workflows.name: Continue with all required fields present
workflows.on_success: proceeds to overview step

workflows.name: Continue with missing required field(s) (generic)
workflows.on_success: displays error banner(s): 'Error: First Name is required', 'Error: Last Name is required', or 'Error: Postal Code is required'

workflows.name: Cancel and return to Shopping Cart
workflows.on_success: returns to Shopping Cart

workflows.name: Continue with First_Name missing
workflows.on_success: displays error banner: 'Error: First Name is required'

workflows.name: Continue with Last_Name missing
workflows.on_success: displays error banner: 'Error: Last Name is required'

workflows.name: Continue with Zip_Postal_Code missing
workflows.on_success: displays error banner: 'Error: Postal Code is required'

workflows.name: Complete order (Finish)
workflows.on_success: completes order and navigates to confirmation page

workflows.name: Cancel checkout (Cancel)
workflows.on_success: exits checkout

workflows.name: Back Home — return to Product Inventory and clear cart
workflows.on_success: navigates to Product Inventory and clears the cart

workflows.name: Logout (end session and return to login)
Click Reset App State button
workflows.on_success: clears cart and resets in-app state (updates cart badge and resets add/remove button states); user remains logged in
